imageAlt: Practice mobile app roadmap item preview image
title: Practice mobile app
summaryBody: More of a ‘nice-to-have’ for practices and wouldn’t be a game-changer to convince more to join FreeAgent, especially compared to other features. So the effort required (and additional ongoing maintenance) doesn’t justify the anticipated strategic impact right now
detailBody: More of a ‘nice-to-have’ for practices and wouldn’t be a game-changer to convince more to join FreeAgent, especially compared to other features. So the effort required (and additional ongoing maintenance) doesn’t justify the anticipated strategic impact right now
